zh.lifeSummary: 當Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard於1066年出生在法國布格o-達蒙特巴德時，她的父親Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard26歲，母親Humberge de Roucy18歲。她和Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1106年8月31日在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布維爾-素-拉-福特艾享年40歲，埋葬在法國布格o-達迪喬。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard于1066年出生在法国布格o-達蒙特巴德时，她的父亲Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard26岁，母亲Humberge de Roucy18岁。她和Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1106年8月31日在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布維爾-素-拉-福特艾享年40岁，埋葬在法国布格o-達迪喬。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aleth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with Old High German blide ‘happy, friendly’. This surname is rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: "Blessed
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English iblescede ‘blessed, happy, fortunate’.

variants.name: Blissett
meanings: from the Middle English female personal name Blisset or Blissot, apparently a pet form of Middle English bliss ‘gladness, joy’ used as a personal name.
variant of Blessed, from Middle English iblescede ‘blessed, happy, fortunate’. Compare Bleazard .

variants.name: Blezard
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Blessed  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard was born in 1066, in Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, her father, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, was 26 and her mother, Humberge de Roucy, was 18. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine. She died on 31 August 1106, in Ville-sous-la-Ferté, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 40, and was buried in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard est née en 1066, à Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Humberge de Roucy, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine. Elle est décédée le 31 août 1106, à Ville-sous-la-Ferté, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard 1066 in Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard 26 und ihre Mutter Humberge de Roucy 18. Sie hatte mit Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. August 1106 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Ville-sous-la-Ferté, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard è nata il nel 1066 nel Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Humberge de Roucy, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine. Morì il 31 agosto 1106, nel Ville-sous-la-Ferté, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbardが1066年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルモントバードで生まれた時，父Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbardは26歳，母Humberge de Roucyは18歳であった。彼女はTescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaineとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1106年8月31日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベヴィレ-ソウス-ラ-フエルトeで40歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルディジョンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard(이)가 1066년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 몽바드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Humberge de Roucy(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1106년 8월 31일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 비레-소우스-라-퍼트e에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 디조에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard nasceu em 1066, em Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Humberge de Roucy, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine. Ela faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1106, em Ville-sous-la-Ferté, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard родилась в 1066 г. в местности монтбард, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Humberge de Roucy, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine. Она умерла 31 августа 1106 г. в местности вилле-соус-ла-фиртe, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aleth "Blessed Alice" De Montbard nació en 1066, en Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Bernard II de Montbard, Sgr of Montbard, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Humberge de Roucy, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Tescelin le Roux Sorus, Sgr de Fontaine. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1106, en Ville-sous-la-Ferté, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.
